data.name: ResourceNotFound
data.value: The requested resource was not found.

data.name: OperationFailed
data.value: The operation could not be completed.

data.name: ReservationNotFound
data.value: The reservation was not found.

data.name: RoomNotFound
data.value: The selected room was not found.

data.name: RoomInMaintenance
data.value: The selected room is in maintenance.

data.name: InvalidGuestsQuantity
data.value: The guests quantity exceeds the room capacity of {0}.

data.name: ReservationOverlap
data.value: The reservation overlaps with another reservation or active stay.

data.name: InvalidDateRange
data.value: The start date must be earlier than the end date.

data.name: InvalidDurationHours
data.value: The reservation duration must be a whole number of hours. The start time can be any minute.

data.name: InvalidRequest
data.value: The reservation request is incomplete.

data.name: InvalidGuestName
data.value: The guest name must contain 3 to 80 valid characters.

data.name: InvalidDni
data.value: The DNI must contain exactly 8 digits.

data.name: InvalidPhone
data.value: The phone number must contain exactly 9 digits.

data.name: InvalidEmail
data.value: The email address format is invalid.

data.name: InvalidPaymentMethod
data.value: The selected payment method is invalid.

data.name: InvalidReservationStatus
data.value: The reservation status is invalid.

data.name: InvalidPrepaidAmount
data.value: The prepaid amount cannot be negative.

data.name: DNI is required
data.value: DNI is required

data.name: DNI must have exactly 8 digits
data.value: DNI must have exactly 8 digits

data.name: Email must have a valid format
data.value: Email must have a valid format

data.name: Email must not exceed 250 characters
data.value: Email must not exceed 250 characters

data.name: Guest name is required
data.value: Guest name is required

data.name: Guest name must have 3 to 80 valid characters
data.value: Guest name must have 3 to 80 valid characters

data.name: Guests quantity must be between 1 and 50
data.value: Guests quantity must be between 1 and 50

data.name: Hotel identifier is required
data.value: Hotel identifier is required

data.name: Hotel identifier must not exceed 64 characters
data.value: Hotel identifier must not exceed 64 characters

data.name: Hours must be greater than zero
data.value: Hours must be greater than zero

data.name: Payment method is required
data.value: Payment method is required

data.name: Payment method must be cash card transfer or yape
data.value: Payment method must be cash card transfer or yape

data.name: Payment status is required
data.value: Payment status is required

data.name: Payment status must be pending or paid
data.value: Payment status must be pending or paid

data.name: Phone is required
data.value: Phone is required

data.name: Phone must have exactly 9 digits
data.value: Phone must have exactly 9 digits

data.name: Prepaid amount must be zero or greater
data.value: Prepaid amount must be zero or greater

data.name: Reservation amount must be zero or greater
data.value: Reservation amount must be zero or greater

data.name: Room identifier is required
data.value: Room identifier is required

data.name: Room identifier must not exceed 64 characters
data.value: Room identifier must not exceed 64 characters

data.name: Status is required
data.value: Status is required

data.name: Status must be confirmed cancelled or completed
data.value: Status must be confirmed cancelled or completed

data.name: StartDateInPast
data.value: The reservation start date cannot be earlier than the current time.

data.name: CannotCancelStartedReservation
data.value: The reservation cannot be cancelled after its start time.

data.name: Additional guests data must not exceed 4000 characters
data.value: Additional guests data must not exceed 4000 characters

data.name: Guests quantity must be between 1 and 99
data.value: Guests quantity must be between 1 and 99
